name: Guild screen exposes the complete eleven-class growth hub

planSteps.description: Navigate to https://colosseum-survivors.pages.dev/
Click the button with data-testid start-game
Enter TestSprite-3113 into the input with data-testid player-name
Click the button with data-testid confirm-player-name
The button with data-testid guild-tab-class is visible
The button with data-testid guild-tab-class has text CLASS & TREE
The button with data-testid guild-tab-class has aria-pressed true
The button with data-testid guild-tab-training is visible
The button with data-testid guild-tab-training has text TRAINING
The button with data-testid guild-tab-gear is visible
The button with data-testid guild-tab-gear has text INVENTORY
The button with data-testid battle-open is visible
The button with data-testid battle-open has text ENTER THE ARENA
The element with data-testid class-roster is visible
The button with data-testid class-fighter is visible
The button with data-testid class-knight is visible
The button with data-testid class-berserker is visible
The button with data-testid class-dwarf is visible
The button with data-testid class-paladin is visible
The button with data-testid class-mage is visible
The button with data-testid class-priest is visible
The button with data-testid class-warlock is visible
The button with data-testid class-elf is visible
The button with data-testid class-thief is visible
The button with data-testid class-monk is visible
No button labeled MORE is present
No button labeled ALL CLASSES is present
Click the button with data-testid class-mage
The element with data-testid selected-class-name has text Mage
The element with data-testid selected-class-weapons has text Fire Bolt
The element with data-testid selected-class-strength contains non-empty text
The element with data-testid selected-class-weakness contains non-empty text
The element with data-testid selected-class-behavior contains non-empty text
The button with data-testid perk-t1-a is visible
The button with data-testid perk-t5-b is visible
Click the button with data-testid guild-tab-training
The button with data-testid buy-atk is visible
Click the button with data-testid guild-tab-gear
The element with data-testid inventory-panel is visible
